# WinSyslog documentation

> Canonical documentation for WinSyslog 26.07.

## Event ID reference

- Human-readable Event ID index: https://www.winsyslog.com/files/manual/current/winsyslogspecific/event-id-reference/index.html
- Exact troubleshooting procedures: https://www.winsyslog.com/files/manual/current/winsyslogspecific/event-id-reference/procedures.html
- Machine-readable Event ID and procedure catalog: https://www.winsyslog.com/files/manual/current/event-ids.json
- Documentation sitemap: https://www.winsyslog.com/files/manual/current/sitemap.xml

HTML pages are authoritative. The JSON catalog and this file are discovery aids.
The reference covers product-generated Windows Application Event Log diagnostics and
excludes externally collected events and administrator-selected action Event IDs.
